name: Priya Sharma
text: Analytics Circle completely changed my career trajectory. The mentorship was unlike anything else — my mentor had worked at Google and gave me insider prep.

name: Rahul Verma
text: The GenAI course was incredibly hands-on. We built actual RAG pipelines and deployed LLM apps. Got placed within 3 weeks of completing the program.

name: Anjali Singh
text: I had zero coding background. The BA program eased me in perfectly. The instructors were patient and the community support was amazing throughout.
